response: the initial prime number is 12347 the sum of the squares of the digits of 12347 is 1² + 2² + 3² + 4² + 7² = 1 + 4 + 9 + 16 + 49 = 79 the prime number at age 14 is 101 the prime number at age 15 is 107 the prime number at age 16 is 131 the prime number at age 17 is 149 the prime number at age 18 is 167 the prime number at age 19 is 179 each prime is greater than the sum of the squares of the digits of the previous number player
